method: God-first Conquest builds: each path is assembled from that god's ability kit (metrics + ability text tags + burst/dps style) and patch trajectory, using archetype slot recipes so gods in the same role diverge. Role cards explain the job only — they are NOT a full build. Carry/Mid backline + pen; Jungle ganks; Solo frontline bulk; Support peels. Shop actives ≤2 default (hard max 3). Damage roles enforce ≥10 matching pen.

template.description: Conquest duo ADC (backline): sustained basic-attack DPS, crit, penetration, and lifesteal. Support peels so you can free-hit.
